zh-HK: Sales History / Summary Recap UI refresh：加入 Table/KPI view toggle、Trend evo% 合併卡、年度 KPI 月度展開與 matrix tables
Customer Report / EDM 帳號層級修正：以 Ship-to 為銷售基礎，Sold-to / National Leader 正確 roll-up，並避免同號帳號雙計
Solution Preview / Solution Mix MTD 修正：本月 MTD Daily 作 source of truth，支援多個 Item Code 欄名，零金額命中仍會顯示客戶與 Solution row
en: Refreshed Sales History / Summary Recap UI with Table/KPI view toggle, combined Trend evo% card, expandable yearly KPI months, and matrix tables
Fixed Customer Report / EDM account hierarchy: Ship-to is now the sales base, Sold-to / National Leader roll up correctly, and duplicate same-account rows are avoided
Fixed Solution Preview / Solution Mix MTD handling: current-month MTD Daily is the source of truth, Item Code aliases are supported, and zero-amount hits still show customers and Solution rows
